# WordWise PH — llms.txt
# Guidance for AI language model crawlers

> WordWise PH is a free English learning platform for Filipino kids (Grades 1–6).
> It offers grammar, spelling, typing and word games. Plans start at ₱10/day.
> Website: https://wordwiseph.com

## About
- Name: WordWise PH
- Type: Educational platform / English learning games
- Target: Filipino children ages 5–12, parents, elementary teachers
- Location: Philippines
- Contact: darcant01@gmail.com

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://wordwiseph.com/
- App/Games: https://wordwiseph.com/app.html
- Blog: https://wordwiseph.com/blog.html
- About: https://wordwiseph.com/about.html
- Privacy: https://wordwiseph.com/privacy.html

## Games
- Grammar Quiz (Easy, Medium, Hard, Infinite)
- Spell It Right
- Shark Typing
- Odd One Out
- Word Scramble
- Word Chain
- Word Sprint
- Kids Corner (Letter Tracer, ABC Order, Missing Letter, Rhyme Time, Color Games, Animal Games)

## Pricing
- Free: limited games, no payment needed
- Trial: ₱10/day
- Weekly: ₱35/week
- Basic: ₱99/month (1 child account)
- Premium: ₱199/month (up to 3 child accounts)
- Payment: GCash (0931-762-5402)
